## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting to discuss content strategy and goals for increasing organic traffic and lead generation for Webstacks through an AI-powered content program.](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Double organic traffic and pipeline over the next 6 months while maintaining high lead quality](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Identify new content opportunities beyond current focus areas like web design/development](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Increase content volume and frequency while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Explore interactive/programmatic content ideas leveraging Webstacks' technical capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy

  - [Focused on web design topics driving to ebook on best website designs](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
  - [Some content on headless CMS implementation driving to checklist download](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2642.0)
  - [Design-focused blogs perform well but are labor intensive](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
  - [20-30 new blogs per month, mix of internal and external writers](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile

  - [B2B tech/software companies, 100-5000 employees, funded/post-IPO](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [Target personas: VPs/Directors of Marketing, Web Strategists, Website Managers](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Common triggers: website migration, rebranding, new marketing hire](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)

### Success Metrics

  - [Double organic traffic from \~12k/month to 24k+/month](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Double pipeline from \~10 opps/month while maintaining 30% from organic](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Increase diversity of traffic sources beyond top pages](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Keyword research \> Outline \> Writing \> Design \> Reviews \> Publish](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
  - [Need to streamline review process, especially for client examples](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3214.0)
  - [Explore ways to refresh older content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share meeting recording, Webstacks brand playbook, content dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [Schedule deep dive on Webstacks CMS and content processes by Wed](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3325.0)
  - [GrowthX to start competitive research and send 1-2 sample articles for voice calibration](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
  - [Discuss content strategy, priorities, and publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/qkeb8xtPyEGHmZ4A33thGyJbUsoAetxw?tab=summary&timestamp=3264.0)
